text.title: Laravel Umbrella Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to plan a Laravel feature end-to-end via this umbrella.

step.name: route-to-sub-methodologies
step.action: Pick the relevant sub-methodologies: HTTP shape → `php-laravel-patterns`; ORM model touched → `php-eloquent`; queue dispatch → `php-laravel-queues`; new tests → `php-phpunit-testing`.
step.output: List of sub-methodology rules to apply

step.name: enforce-version-and-env
step.action: Confirm `"php": "^8.2"` + Laravel `^10|^11`. Ensure `.env` and `.env.*` are git-ignored. Replace `env(...)` calls inside services with `config(...)` references.
step.decision-gate: If `.env` is tracked, BLOCK per `env-secrets-not-config-cache-leak` rule.

step.name: install-queue-worker
step.action: Set `QUEUE_CONNECTION=redis` for prod. Install Horizon. Create Supervisor program `laravel-worker` with `autostart=true autorestart=true numprocs=4`. Verify with `php artisan queue:monitor`.
step.decision-gate: If `QUEUE_CONNECTION=sync` in prod env, BLOCK per `queue-driver-not-sync-in-prod` rule.

step.name: wire-scheduler
step.action: Add one cron entry `* * * * * cd /srv/app && php artisan schedule:run >> /dev/null 2>&1`. Move per-task cron entries into `schedule()`. Heartbeat ping from a recurring job.

step.name: harden-tests
step.action: Run `php-phpunit-testing` sub-methodology: Pest + `RefreshDatabase`, factories, HTTP feature tests for each endpoint, query budget assertion per request.
